Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x63D8 "YIEARKUNGFUII-4400-63D8" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Yie Ar Kung-Fu II (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Filled out the screen buffer at $4400 with all spaces and placed an init routine and 512 bytes of code there, which is copied down from $4500 to $0200 where it was placed by the loader originally (the screen buffer at $4400 is constantly rewritten when displaying the title screen, so this does no harm). This allows us to keep this data above the dump start address of $0400. As the copy routine writes over our loader code at $033C, we do not RTS, but rather jump to the entry point ($63D8) at the end of it.
